title: Star Wars 3-D
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:StarWars3D-logo.png]] |title=''Star Wars 3-D'' |writer=*[[Len Wein]] {{C|1–2}}''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Rebellion Vol. 3]]'' *[[John Stephenson]] {{C|3}} |penciller=Various |inker=Various |letterer=Various |colorist= |cover artist=Various |editor=*[[John Stephenson]] {{C|1–2}} *[[Lucy Autrey Wilson]] {{C|3}} |publisher=[[Blackthorne Publishing]] |start date=[[December]] [[1987]] |end date=Fall [[1988]] |schedule=Biannual |format=Miniseries {{C|[[Wikipedia:Blackthorne Publishing#Blackthorne 3-D Series|''Blackthorne 3-D Series'']]}} |issues=3 |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Rebellion Vol. 3]]'' dates the events of ''Star Wars 3-D'' to "many [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]]" after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which corresponds to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars 3-D''''' is a three-issue [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] miniseries written by [[Len Wein]] and [[John Stephenson]]. It was published by [[Blackthorne Publishing]] as a part of the [[Wikipedia:Blackthorne Publishing#Blackthorne 3-D Series|''Blackthorne 3-D Series'']] from [[1987]] to [[1988]]. ==Development== The issues were originally printed with a red/blue "3-D" effect and were each packaged with a pair of 3-D glasses. Black-and-white versions of the issues were later collected in ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1]]'' ([[2013]]) and ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Rebellion Vol. 3]]'' ([[2019]]).''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1]]'' ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars 3-D}} ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" align="center" width="15%" |Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" align="center" width="15%" |Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" align="center" width="15%" |Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
